vocab.meaning: sự uể oải sau khi ăn trưa
vocab.example: I avoid studying in the afternoon because I often succumb to the post-lunch slump, which severely hampers my focus.

vocab.meaning: thời điểm vàng, thời gian hoạt động tốt nhất
vocab.example: Early morning is my prime time for academic pursuits, as my mind is fresh and free from daily distractions.

vocab.meaning: nhịp điệu sinh học ban ngày
vocab.example: My diurnal rhythm is naturally geared toward the morning hours, enabling me to tackle complex problems with ease.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về trí tuệ
vocab.example: There is a certain level of mental clarity available at 7 AM that I simply cannot replicate later in the day.

vocab.meaning: sự yên tĩnh không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I prefer morning study sessions primarily for the uninterrupted silence before the rest of the world wakes up.

vocab.meaning: sự lắng xuống/tạm lắng vào cuối buổi chiều
vocab.example: I sometimes utilize the late-afternoon lull to do light reading or organize my notes rather than intense memorization.

vocab.meaning: đòi hỏi cao về trí tuệ
vocab.example: I save intellectually demanding tasks for the morning when my brain's processing power is at its peak.

vocab.meaning: làm tan vỡ (thường dùng cho sự tập trung)
vocab.example: By the afternoon, the constant influx of notifications tends to shatter my concentration.

vocab.meaning: vào lúc tảng sáng/sớm tinh mơ
vocab.example: Studying at the crack of dawn allows me to complete my workload before my social responsibilities begin.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu bắt nhịp và làm việc hiệu quả
vocab.example: It takes me a few hours to truly hit my stride, so I find that I'm most productive during the transition from morning to noon.
